attributes.action: Review and caps of expensive vet charges
attributes.additional_details: My vet charges £66 per appointment which is very expensive to care for a pet. Also the supplies you buy from them has a ridiculous mark up on which is unacceptable and unaffordable
attributes.background: Review and cap expensive vet fees

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Regulate veterinary care costs to improve affordability & accessibility
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/769255
